THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LETTIERI & CO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY COLLEEN PAINE, REPRESENTATIVE. DEFENDANT GIUSEPPE SPINOSO IS PRESENT. MATTER DISMISSED DURING PROCEEDING AS IT WAS DETERMINED BY JPT DAVID LAVINE THAT THE DEFENDANT NAMED IN THIS CASE IS IMPROPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
